description: Index of all 18 Tier-2 structured block schemas. Written as a single overview because the remaining 14 schemas follow the same pattern as existence_layer_d, internal_dynamics, hypothesis_verdict, boundary. Each gets its own file when the library is implemented.

blocks.question: Q1, Q7
blocks.description: Local PCA sim_mat evidence: 12 D-dimensions, composite_score, tier, shape_class, landscape_category. The primary Layer A evidence for any candidate.
blocks.status: skeleton — extract from existing register_C01d_keys helper

blocks.question: Q7
blocks.description: SV caller concordance: DELLY/Manta INV calls overlapping this candidate. Lists breakpoints, split/discordant read counts per sample. Physical evidence (real DNA).
blocks.status: skeleton — adapt from flashlight RDS structure

blocks.question: Q7
blocks.description: GHSL haplotype contrast: Clair3 phased genotype patterns that cluster the same samples as PCA (or not). Independent of PCA signal.
blocks.status: skeleton — adapt from GHSL v5 output

blocks.question: Q7
blocks.description: Supplementary Layer B evidence from BND rescue pathway — paired CT=3to3/INV3 (left) + CT=5to5/INV5 (right) junctions that the strict INV callers missed. Co-exists with existence_layer_b. Added 2026-04-17.

blocks.question: Q3, Q6, Q7
blocks.description: Audits disagreement between per-sample carrier assignments from different evidence types (PCA, SV, GHSL, Clair3). Counts how many samples are concordant across all four layers and lists the disagreers.

blocks.question: Q1, Q2
blocks.group_validation_required: NONE (produces initial grouping; seal then synthesises)
blocks.status: written (rewritten chat-15 BK) — internal_dynamics.schema.json. Canonical schema now matches chat-12 decompose-flavor (silhouette / BIC / flashlight / seed counts). The pre-chat-12 recombinant-flavor schema is archived at _archive_superseded/bk_schemas_pre_canonical/internal_dynamics.schema.json.pre_BK; the recombinant content it formerly held is now in its own recombinant_map block.

blocks.question: Q2, Q4
blocks.status: written (chat-15 BK) — recombinant_map.schema.json. Chat-12 R + G gate rewrite. Split out of internal_dynamics during the chat-12 rewrite; 10 keys_extracted entries (8 Q2 + 2 Q2-provenance).

blocks.question: Q1, Q2
blocks.status: written (chat-15 BK) — internal_ancestry_composition.schema.json. Governs C01f promotion gating via composite_flag. Stub variant when Engine B local-Q cache is unavailable (composite_flag = 'unknown_no_engine_b'). 12 keys_extracted entries (2 Q1 + 10 Q2).

blocks.question: Q4
blocks.description: Junction sequence forensics: microhomology length, flanking SDs, TE context, NAHR/NHEJ/MMEJ call.

blocks.question: Q5
blocks.description: GDS by genotype (dosage-based, no groups needed), Fst/dXY between HOM_REF and HOM_INV (needs validated groups). Dual sub-blocks in one file.

blocks.question: Q6
blocks.description: freq_inv, HWE test, family_linkage status, class-balance metrics.

blocks.question: Q1
blocks.description: Shape metrics: span_kb, n_children, aspect ratio, interior homogeneity.

blocks.question: Q1
blocks.description: Per-class ancestry composition: for each of HOM_REF/HET/HOM_INV, the mean Q vector from instant_q at this locus.

blocks.question: Q6
blocks.description: Per-carrier trait burden regression. Only makes sense for VALIDATED groups (group labels must be trustworthy to regress on).

blocks.question: Q1, Q3
blocks.description: Block detection outputs: inner boundary (blue cross), block candidate windows, confidence score.

blocks.question: Q1, Q3
blocks.description: Staircase-block output from the inv_detect heatmap traversal. The primary Phase-2 signal that produced this candidate.

blocks.question: Q7
blocks.description: Peel analysis: does the candidate signal survive successive peeling of high-relatedness samples? Feeds D8.

blocks.question: Q5
blocks.description: Cross-species synteny: is this inversion present in sister species? If present in C. macrocephalus and absent in outgroups → shared ancestral; if only in hatchery line → derived. Dollo parsimony call.

note: Chat 15 BK added recombinant_map + internal_ancestry_composition as separate blocks (they were carved out of internal_dynamics during the chat-12 rewrite but had no canonical schema). internal_dynamics itself was rewritten chat-15 to match current C01i_decompose output. Remaining 13 schemas follow same pattern: required fields list, properties with descriptions and types, keys_extracted mapping block fields to flat key names. Each takes ~15 minutes to write from the corresponding script's output.
